positive: A stylized, symmetrical abstract forest scene composed entirely of interconnected, geometric eucalyptus leaves and silhouettes. The design features a central, dominant grouping that bursts outwards, creating a lush, high-contrast negative space effect. The color palette should be deep indigo, forest teal, and creamy ivory, utilizing clean linework and strong, crisp outlines. The style is modern, graphic illustration with a retro Art Deco influence. Ideal for repeat or central placement on apparel. High detail, vector quality, maximalist yet balanced composition, flat design aesthetic, central symmetry.
negative: blur, realistic, 3d render, photo, text, watermark, noise, low detail, dirty, faded, asymmetry, bad anatomy, artifacts, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, gradients, messy, grunge
